title: oenothera auricula var. tenella
intro: Oenothera auricula var. tenella, also known as a variety of evening primrose, is a plant species that belongs to the family Onagraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, due to its rich content of essential fatty acids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Oenothera auricula var. tenella include its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, improve heart health, and soothe skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal preparations, including oil infusions and teas, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
